textByHashes.cf4d3f80a5aabda7a072b1ced235fc3febb66f9d: Well of course we can talk, silly. Why wouldn't we be able to?
textByHashes.4df91723b8df94e5067985c626e08caa81bc304c: We live in a world where giant lizards with wings fly around and expel highly combustible fluids from their throats, but you never considered a frog could talk?
textByHashes.c714a62f37fa975928a07f39f1ada03e56dd9d8d: Well now that we've established our remarkable linguistic capabilities, how about some introductions. I'm Sue and this is Gary. Over there you have Dave and Jane, and good old Mr Lonesome over there is Cuthbert.
textByHashes.57105e4f32fab13aaa958c142a08fa80caa5d208: Don't talk to me! Speak to the frog prince!
textByHashes.a951aad4ce74417adeaecb40af03e40398968122: Don't talk to me! Speak to the frog princess!
textByHashes.8797a83ebb15aa50cec0fb2e1c504ecb8945864c: ​The frogs do not need your help right now.
textByHashes.414949058b409a5e87b5feddf55d93a77b15caed: Don't look at me, I'm just a frog. Ribbit! Ribbit!
textByHashes.823e69fd2c9fddaa1fb6b1adcaef4c70f2a48c1f: , the frog prince desires your attention!
textByHashes.924f40780af38f57e82c70c01c7347dcbf55ac79: , the frog princess desires your attention!
textByHashes.bed173648eab740f1e03c53dbeea18a5583a7e6a: If you kiss him, , he will turn into a human!
textByHashes.decb616833bb39df31d5b7242d8d1912eb72c942: If you kiss her, , he will turn into a human!
textByHashes.13d682d53c3cb2534f9c68fa48117ecaf4c62d28: If you kiss him, , she will turn into a human!
textByHashes.53b97094e5204be4ec469ffc5470d2e64c8a7cf6: If you kiss her, , she will turn into a human!
textByHashes.c07e1e1395028000b7dc8a353cb6dee487555582: But if you ignore him, , we will turn you into a frog!
textByHashes.55a8e637884ca0ba5401f4c5f4bf061ec0c72c74: But if you ignore her, , we will turn you into a frog!
textByHashes.91fe129840783a969f6aa0f8ca345aa5f1778d27: When it comes to gold, most dwarves are short.
textByHashes.503cd6b4c5fcc41aa6a5d05882c13bbe412f4489: Why? Am I in your way?
textByHashes.78d286e9833f98c704c21a99b2316e2fa2431d7c: Kiss me baby, one more time.
textByHashes.634cc32d3ae4d586a75460bb925dbd57c0fd7c45: The difference between a fairy and a fly is that fairies complain when you eat them.
textByHashes.851dbef43161fdc5779db7ca89f06c73baf3317c: Don't ever pick a fight with a cactus, they have prickly tempers.
textByHashes.0acb00811227e99af511e7fae66abbd7db3d31ab: Oh how I long for my own lily-pad.
textByHashes.d5254f71c87b4af496f1666d7d5db2f2ee8ea883: Please help me. I was transformed into a frog by a well-meaning but sadly frog-obsessed old wizard. Only your touch can turn me back. Will you help me?
textByHashes.01780c4670919871a00e3a51b7577af4af528f44: Thank you so much, . I must return to my fairytale kingdom. But take this as a reward. You can exchange it at the Varrock clothes store for a costume.
textByHashes.1df08fd42dfe77b4f3b7a0a2e9caf8e758ef1b6c: The frogs do not need your help right now.
textByHashes.ec540642abe146e9d4fe9a061465895847710b7e: The frog prince needs your help, !
textByHashes.b1c4c52418ad3526b77714f1842ab4f0e56018ae: The frog princess needs your help, !
textByHashes.7c79de0ec6d489550a89848491bdb88125e4e01c: Please respond to the frog prince, !
textByHashes.ee014894a7f4d61be42f7fb6982b25345c1df306: Please respond to the frog princess, !
textByHashes.ded7a8d7a9115e58d38449ac9c1f421ceb45a318: Are you ready to leave now?
